summary: Completed comprehensive testing of per-route error boundaries implementation. ErrorBoundary component properly supports variant='section' and variant='global' props. All routes load normally without triggering error boundaries. Section error boundaries are correctly wrapped around Admin, Profile, and Match detail routes with proper testIds. Global error boundary wraps entire app. Error boundary fallback UI includes correct text, Retry button, and Go to Homepage button functionality.
passed_tests: ErrorBoundary component supports variant='section' and variant='global' props
Homepage loads normally without error boundaries triggered
Admin route (/admin) is wrapped with section ErrorBoundary (testId='admin-error-fallback')
Match detail route (/match/:matchId) is wrapped with section ErrorBoundary (testId='match-detail-error-fallback')
Profile route (/profile) is wrapped with section ErrorBoundary (testId='profile-error-fallback')
Global error boundary wraps entire app (data-testid='error-boundary-fallback')
Section error boundary fallback shows 'Something went wrong in this section' text
Section error boundary fallback has Retry button that resets error state
Section error boundary fallback has Go to Homepage button
Header/navigation remain visible during all testing (layout preserved)
Existing pages work correctly (leaderboard, about, news, contact, how-it-works)
Admin login works with admin@guessit.com credentials
Match detail routes handle invalid IDs gracefully at application level
